text: Inside this brightly lit, modern space, I am struck by a curious sense of detachment. The glass, the glowing screens, and the scientific motifs on the walls evoke an atmosphere of observation and analysis. I feel like both participant and outsider—invited to reflect, yet not fully enfolded by the environment. The anticipation in the air stirs my philosophical curiosity, leaving me quietly exhilarated, yet uncertain of my role in the unfolding narrative.
